name: OBV20_Don10
description: Combines monthly OBV momentum with a 10-day Donchian low exit on QQQ. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when OBV is rising over 20 days and price remains above the 10-day low, with T-bills on a downside break.
overfit_notes: Two combined indicators (OBV(20) and Don low(10)) with AND/OR logic — moderate tuning

rules.label: Entry (trend)
rules.text: OBV(20)-up AND QQQ > 10-day low: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Entry (neutral)
rules.text: OBV(20)-down AND QQQ > 10-day low: equal-weight top-5 large-caps

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: QQQ < 10-day low: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 fundamental large-caps / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Top 100 by dollar volume, then top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: OBV20_Don20
description: Symmetric monthly OBV with a 20-day Donchian low exit on QQQ. Enters leveraged Nasdaq when OBV is rising over 20 days and price is above the 20-day low; otherwise large-cap basket or T-bills on a channel break.
overfit_notes: Two matched-lookback indicators (OBV(20) and Don low(20)) — mild tuning, fewer free parameters

rules.label: Entry (trend)
rules.text: OBV(20)-up AND QQQ > 20-day low: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Entry (neutral)
rules.text: OBV(20)-down AND QQQ > 20-day low: equal-weight top-5 large-caps

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: QQQ < 20-day low: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 fundamental large-caps / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Top 100 by dollar volume, then top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: OBV20_CCI20
description: Pairs monthly OBV momentum with CCI on QQQ. Requires OBV rising over 20 days plus CCI > 0 for leveraged Nasdaq, and rotates to T-bills on either OBV weakness or deeply oversold CCI.
overfit_notes: Three tuned levers: OBV(20)-up, CCI(20)>0, and CCI<-100 with AND/OR logic

rules.label: Entry (trend)
rules.text: OBV(20)-up AND CCI(20) > 0: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Entry (neutral)
rules.text: Mixed: equal-weight top-5 large-caps

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: OBV(20)-down OR CCI < -100: 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 fundamental large-caps / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Top 100 by dollar volume, then top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: OBV20_ADX14
description: Combines monthly OBV momentum with ADX directional bias on QQQ. Requires OBV rising plus +DI > -DI for leveraged Nasdaq, and exits to T-bills on either OBV weakness or a confirmed bearish ADX regime.
overfit_notes: Four tuned components: OBV(20)-up, +DI vs -DI direction, ADX(14)>25 bearish floor, and AND/OR combination

rules.label: Strength filter
rules.text: Bearish trigger requires ADX(14) > 25 AND -DI > +DI

rules.label: Entry (trend)
rules.text: OBV(20)-up AND +DI > -DI: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Entry (neutral)
rules.text: Mixed: equal-weight top-5 large-caps

rules.label: Exit
rules.text: OBV(20)-down OR (ADX > 25 AND -DI > +DI): 100% BIL

rules.label: Symbols
rules.text: Signal: QQQ. Execution: TQQQ / top-5 fundamental large-caps / BIL

rules.label: Universe
rules.text: Top 100 by dollar volume, then top 5 by market cap

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)
